Effortless Planning

Meal Prep Ideas

WIN-DIA khakhra in your weekly meal plan — ready in minutes.

400kcal

Office Lunch Box

2 Khakhras + dip cup + fresh fruit = 400 kcal balanced meal

320kcal

Kids Tiffin Box

Mini khakhra sandwiches + cheese cubes + grapes = 320 kcal

450kcal

Travel Snack Pack

4 khakhras in airtight container + trail mix = 450 kcal

380kcal

Post-Workout Box

Khakhra + protein spread + banana = 380 kcal
